name: WSOP Event #55: $250,000 Super High Roller No-Limit Hold'em
exclusion_reason: RE-ENTRY field (75 entries). Full-blog reconstruction was attempted (entire PokerNews live feed scraped via Safari) and STILL falls short of exact net P&L: (1) at least 2 entrants are anonymised at the source ('[Removed:554]', '[Removed:564]') so their buy-ins can't be attributed to a name; (2) per-player bullet counts are only partially logged in prose — Day 1 alone was 58 entries from 51 unique players (7 re-entries), and the bullet-column seat draws are mid-event snapshots, not a final cumulative tally. ~62 named entrants recovered, but not a complete, exactly-counted field. Excluded.
notes: Full 12-place payouts captured from PokerNews. Suvarna won $5,415,152 over 75 entries, $18,675,000 pool. Re-entry reconstruction test (option 2): the live blog exposes a 'Bullet' column and names most re-entries (Haxton/Koon/Kisacikoglu re-entered, Lehne out on bullet 2, Vogelsang on 2), but anonymised entrants + incomplete bullet logging make an EXACT field impossible — confirming the freezeout-only ceiling.
